recipe.title: Jarred pepper pasta
recipe.description: Jamie shows us how to make a midweek meal in no time with his easy no-cook pasta sauce. Creamy cottage cheese and chilli flakes take this to the next level.

ingredients.name: ½–1 teaspoon dried red chilli flakes

steps.descr: Cook the pasta according to the packet instructions
steps.instructions: Cook the pasta according to the packet instructions.

on_enter.say: Cook the pasta according to the packet instructions.

steps.descr: Blitz the parsley (stalks and all) in a blender with...
steps.instructions: Blitz the parsley (stalks and all) in a blender with enough extra virgin olive oil to make a vibrant green oil, then pour into a clean jam jar.

on_enter.say: Blitz the parsley (stalks and all) in a blender with enough extra virgin olive oil to make a vibrant green oil, then pour into a clean jam jar.

steps.descr: Peel the garlic and place in the blender (there’s no...
steps.instructions: Peel the garlic and place in the blender (there’s no need to clean it) with the jarred peppers (juice and all), the almonds, chilli flakes, 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar and half the cottage cheese. Blitz until super-smooth.

on_enter.say: Peel the garlic and place in the blender (there’s no need to clean it) with the jarred peppers (juice and all), the almonds, chilli flakes, 2 tablespoons of olive oil, 1 tablespoon of red wine vinegar and half the cottage cheese. Blitz until super-smooth.

steps.descr: Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of starchy cooking...
steps.instructions: Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of starchy cooking water, then return it to the pan. Pour over the pepper sauce and toss together over the heat, loosening with a splash of cooking water, if needed, then season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper.

on_enter.say: Drain the pasta, reserving a mugful of starchy cooking water, then return it to the pan. Pour over the pepper sauce and toss together over the heat, loosening with a splash of cooking water, if needed, then season to perfection with sea salt and black pepper.

steps.descr: Divide between serving plates, dot over the remaining...
steps.instructions: Divide between serving plates, dot over the remaining cottage cheese, then drizzle with parsley oil, to taste, keeping the rest in the fridge for up to 3 days, or freezing in an ice cube tray for future meals.

on_enter.say: Divide between serving plates, dot over the remaining cottage cheese, then drizzle with parsley oil, to taste, keeping the rest in the fridge for up to 3 days, or freezing in an ice cube tray for future meals.
